positive: An abstract, whimsical celestial tapestry featuring interconnected geometric constellations and bioluminescent deep-sea flora. The main composition should be a central grouping of stylized, glowing cosmic elements—like nebulas and star clusters—interspersed with silhouettes of majestic, stylized sea creatures (whales, jellyfish, deep-sea rays). Use a vibrant, highly contrasted palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, ethereal lavender, and pops of neon coral. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau fluidity and modern psychedelic pop art, with strong, clean outlines and smooth gradients. The overall mood is mystical and dreamlike. The composition must be balanced and symmetrical, designed as a seamless, repeat-friendly print graphic. Studio shot, high contrast, minimal noise, perfect composition, symmetrical, volumetric lighting.
negative: lowres, bad anatomy, blurry, washed out, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, noise, grain, amateur, logo, trademark, copyrighted, cropped
